sql:
SELECT  
            FLTBPSIN AS IN_BPS
            , ROUND(FLTBPSIN_PREDICT::NUMERIC , 2) AS IN_PREDICT
            , ROUND(FLTBPSIN_THRESHOLD_UPPER::NUMERIC , 2) AS IN_THRESHOLD_UPPER
            , ROUND(FLTBPSIN_THRESHOLD_LOWER::NUMERIC , 2) AS IN_THRESHOLD_LOWER
            , FLTBPSIN_ANOMALY AS IN_ANOMALY
            , FLTBPSOUT AS OUT_BPS
            , ROUND(FLTBPSOUT_PREDICT::NUMERIC , 2) AS out_predict
            , ROUND(FLTBPSOUT_THRESHOLD_UPPER::NUMERIC, 2) AS OUT_THRESHOLD_UPPER
            , ROUND(FLTBPSOUT_THRESHOLD_LOWER::NUMERIC, 2) AS OUT_THRESHOLD_LOWER
            , FLTBPSOUT_ANOMALY AS OUT_ANOMALY
        FROM    rca.tb_anomalous_ai_result AR
        INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst PM ON AR.STRIFID = PM.IF_NUM AND AR.STRRESID = PM.NODE_NUM
        WHERE   PM.node_id= 'pangyo-5812'
        AND     PM.if_id = 'xe33'
        AND     MEASURED_DATETIME = '2024-12-10 20:29:00'::TIMESTAMP
